countingRules.uniqueItem: one source item record/block, not one visible line
countingRules.technicalUniqueId: a stable source identifier distinct from display name
countingRules.variant: one explicitly declared selectable or historical variant; roll ranges are counted separately
countingRules.baseAssignment: one item-to-base relationship; name-only joins are not technical assignments
countingRules.visibleModLine: one non-header line in a PoB static item block
countingRules.technicalModDefinition: one stable mod ID with structured stat references
countingRules.statCombination: ordered non-empty stat-ID tuple on one technical mod
countingRules.variableRange: one technical mod or visible line containing at least one unequal minimum/maximum pair
countingRules.grantedEffect: one item-linked technical granted skill/support ID; visible names are reported separately
countingRules.unresolvedText: visible line without a lossless item-linked technical mod/stat identity

sources.codeLicense: generated-data repository; no general data license asserted
sources.gameDataStatus: GGG-derived; existing project decision covers only narrow non-Unique affix scopes

files.records: not counted; full skill data remains blocked

gaps: no item variants at this pin
sources.role: partial technical control source; not a Unique main source

sources.gameDataStatus: parser license does not license generated GGG data
sources.finding: uniques.py reads UniqueStashLayout, Words and visual identity only; mods and bases are exported separately and never joined to Unique rows

sources.release: dev head checked 2026-07-22; release mapping unknown
sources.gameDataStatus: Unique files state Item data (c) Grinding Gear Games; code license is not a separate data grant
gaps: no technical Mod/Stat ID on item lines
variants combine history, choices and QoL/test states
sources.role: rich control source for coverage, variants and mechanics; not import source

sources.approval: rejected as main/control baseline when current PoB2 exists

sources.gameDataStatus: extracted from maintainer licensed local PoE2 install; no general redistribution grant asserted
README states data under data/ is derived from client assets and copyrighted by GGG

comparison.reason: no shared stable technical Unique identifier exists across RePoE, PoB/PoBR and poe2-mcp
textOnlyComparable: RePoE Words id/name to PoB/PoBR name
PoB/PoBR base names to RePoE base display names
notComparable: Unique item to RePoE/MCP mod ID
PoB variant to game variant ID
PoB granted skill name to item-linked GrantedEffect ID

representativeExamples.name: Astramentis
representativeExamples.kind: variable global modifiers and historical variant
representativeExamples.pob: base Stellar Amulet; two variants; visible roll lines
representativeExamples.poe2Mcp: possible generic mods only; no item link
representativeExamples.projectSupport: simple attribute tags partly expressible; exact real model unsupported

representativeExamples.name: Choir of the Storm
representativeExamples.pob: visible Grants Skill Lightning Bolt and two variants
representativeExamples.projectSupport: granted skills unsupported by current Unique Analyzer
representativeExamples.approvalRisk: skill name is not an ID

representativeExamples.name: Controlled Metamorphosis
representativeExamples.pob: radius and allocation mechanics with ten variant declarations
representativeExamples.projectSupport: Unique Analyzer blocks jewel slot; passive/radius semantics unsupported

representativeExamples.name: Arakaali's Gift
representativeExamples.pob: base Antidote Charm and conditional recovery text
representativeExamples.projectSupport: Charm slot and trigger simulation unsupported

representativeExamples.name: Olroth's Resolve
representativeExamples.kind: Unique Life Flask with historical versions

representativeExamples.name: Blackbraid
representativeExamples.kind: Unique armour with local/global and historical lines
representativeExamples.pob: three variants, local armour and global defence lines
representativeExamples.projectSupport: simple tags partly expressible; exact local/base calculation absent

representativeExamples.name: Double Vision
representativeExamples.kind: Unique weapon, multi-line effect and granted skill
representativeExamples.pob: Dyad Crossbow, damage rolls, Gemini Surge and split effect line
representativeExamples.projectSupport: weapon locals, ammunition and granted skill unsupported

decisions.reason: identity fields are incomplete and name-based
PoB variants lack stable technical IDs and mix variant concepts

conclusion: No productive Unique source or scope is approved. A future import requires an independently reproducible, patch-pinned item-to-base-to-mod mapping with stable IDs and a separate engine-support plan.
